554[Is Nietzsche a political thinker?](https://philpapers.org/rec/NUSINA)*International Journal of Philosophical Studies* 5 (1). 1997.Nietzsche claimed to be a political thinker in Ecce Homo and elsewhere. He constantly compared his thought with other political theorists, chiefly Rousseau, Kant and Mill, and he claimed to offer an alternative to the bankruptcy of Enlightenment liberalism. studentsoftheapproach.
